title: Add safety check for missing script tag in build.js
description: build.js:34 — html.indexOf('<script') returning -1 causes slice(0, -1) which silently corrupts output. Fix: throw if script tag not found.

title: Fix duplicate nativeTheme listeners on window recreation
description: src/main.ts:192-196 — nativeTheme.on('updated', ...) registers a new listener each time createWindow() is called. On macOS, closing and reopening the window stacks listeners. Fix: guard against duplicate registration or remove before re-adding.

title: Fix path traversal validation for case-insensitive filesystems
description: src/adapters/fs-note-store.ts:31 uses resolved.startsWith(this._vaultPath + path.sep) which is case-sensitive. On case-insensitive NTFS, this could be bypassed. Fix: use path.relative() and check for '..' prefix instead.

title: Fix autosave race condition causing data loss on note switch
description: The autosave captures `() => this._editor.value` as a closure (src/renderer/index.ts:319). If the user switches notes before the 500ms debounce fires, the closure reads the new note's content but saves under the old note's title — overwriting Note A with Note B's content. Fix: pass the body value directly at schedule time, or validate the title hasn't changed before writing.

title: Wrap IPC handlers in try-catch for proper error propagation
description: IPC handlers in src/main.ts:95-109 delegate directly to _noteStore methods. If _assertSafeTitle() throws, the rejection propagates raw to the renderer with no catch. Errors may leak internal details. Fix: wrap all IPC handlers in try-catch, return structured error responses.

title: Debounce/serialize file watcher push to prevent stale state
description: Multiple concurrent watcher events (add, change, unlink) and simultaneous IPC calls (notes:write, notes:delete) all invoke _noteStore.list() without synchronization (src/main.ts:52-109). This can send stale or inconsistent data to the renderer. Fix: debounce or serialize _push() calls.

title: Validate vault path accessibility after dialog selection
description: src/main.ts:79-91 — after dialog.showOpenDialog(), the selected path is used without verifying read access. If the directory is deleted between selection and first use, operations fail silently. Fix: check fs.access before setting vault.

title: Distinguish 'no vault' from 'empty vault' in IPC responses
description: src/main.ts:93-97 — (await _noteStore?.list()) ?? [] returns [] when vault isn't configured, indistinguishable from 'vault exists but empty'. The renderer can't tell the user something is wrong. Fix: return null when vault is not set, handle in renderer.

title: Use discriminated union for handleEnterDecision return type
description: src/renderer/app-logic.ts:14 — returns { action: string; title: string } but callers only check 'open' and 'create'. Should be a discriminated union: { action: 'open' | 'create'; title: string } for type safety.

title: Add chokidar watcher error handler
description: src/main.ts:52-73 — no _watcher.on('error', ...) listener is registered. If the vault directory becomes inaccessible (permissions, unmount, deletion), the watcher silently dies and the app stops updating. Fix: add error handler that notifies the renderer.

title: Add cleanup/destroy methods to controllers
description: resize, toast, and help controllers register event listeners and timers with no destroy() method. Not a problem in single-window SPA today, but poor lifecycle hygiene. Affects: resize-controller.ts (mousedown listener), toast-controller.ts (timers), help-controller.ts (click listener).

title: Configure marked.js to disable HTML pass-through
description: src/renderer/controllers/preview-controller.ts:30 — marked.parse() passes through raw HTML by default. DOMPurify strips it, but disabling HTML in marked adds defense-in-depth. Fix: configure marked with sanitize/html options.

title: Add renderer-side title validation for path safety
description: src/renderer/app-logic.ts:139-150 — validateRename() only checks empty/duplicate. Doesn't check path traversal (../), null bytes, slashes, or dot-prefixed names. These are caught by _assertSafeTitle() server-side but give cryptic error toasts. Fix: add a validateTitle() function in renderer checking for /, \, \0, leading dots, and use it in both _createNote and rename flows.

title: Use safer error type checking in autosave and toast
description: autosave-controller.ts:38 uses (err as Error).message — if a non-Error is thrown, message is undefined. Similar pattern in other catch blocks. Fix: use err instanceof Error ? err.message : String(err).

title: Surface errors from FsNoteStore.list() instead of silent empty array
description: src/adapters/fs-note-store.ts:41-71 — both readdir failure and individual file read failures are silently swallowed, returning [] or skipping files. Users see an empty note list with no error indication. Fix: log errors and/or return an error indicator to the renderer.

title: Guard against rapid duplicate note creation
description: src/renderer/index.ts:223-239 — pressing Enter rapidly before _loadNotes() completes can trigger concurrent note creations with the same title. Fix: add a flag to disable input during async creation, or debounce.

title: Add unit tests for path validation and edge cases
description: Missing test coverage for: _assertSafeTitle() path traversal validation, watcher edge cases (concurrent modifications, permission loss), autosave race condition on note switch, IPC error propagation to renderer. These are critical code paths with no automated tests.

title: Define IPC channel names as shared constants
description: src/preload.ts:6-14 — channel names are hardcoded strings. Misspelling a channel name is a silent runtime failure. Fix: define channel names as a shared const object used by both preload and main.

title: Add try-catch around marked.parse() in preview controller
description: src/renderer/controllers/preview-controller.ts:30 — if marked.parse() throws on malformed input, the exception propagates uncaught. Fix: wrap in try-catch, show fallback error message in preview panel.
